source_classes.direct: Official disclosures, filings, regulators, issuer pages, and issuer factsheets.
source_classes.class_a: Public institutional research and market commentary.
source_classes.corroborating_journalism: Reputable journalism that corroborates or contextualises a thesis.
source_classes.social: Reddit and similar sources for discovery, sentiment, objections, and alternatives.

stable_collectors.name: SEC EDGAR company submissions
stable_collectors.notes: No API key. Requires a 10-digit CIK. Use for 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, 20-F, 6-K and other recent filings.

stable_collectors.name: SEC EDGAR company facts
stable_collectors.notes: Use after filings are detected, not as a broad daily scrape.

stable_collectors.name: Federal Reserve RSS feeds
stable_collectors.notes: Useful for rate, liquidity, and broad US market context.

stable_collectors.name: Companies House API
stable_collectors.notes: Requires an API key. Useful for UK company filings and officers, less useful for funds.

stable_collectors.name: Bank of England news and monetary policy
stable_collectors.notes: Use for UK rates, inflation, monetary policy, and sterling context.

stable_collectors.name: European Central Bank press releases
stable_collectors.notes: Use for eurozone rate and macro context.

stable_collectors.name: Financial Conduct Authority news
stable_collectors.notes: Useful for UK regulatory, promotions, scam, and fund-platform context.

stable_collectors.name: Fund and ETF issuer factsheets
stable_collectors.notes: Each user should add issuer URLs in research/sources.local.json for their own holdings.

manual_or_agent_sources.name: Company investor relations and newsroom
manual_or_agent_sources.use_for: Earnings releases, official guidance, investor presentations, product or partnership announcements.
manual_or_agent_sources.notes: Prefer per-company URLs in sources.local.json because IR page structures vary.

manual_or_agent_sources.name: Reuters business and markets coverage
manual_or_agent_sources.use_for: Context and corroboration. Use agent/web search unless a licensed or stable feed is configured.

manual_or_agent_sources.name: Morningstar research and fund pages
manual_or_agent_sources.use_for: Fund research, valuation context, style boxes, manager commentary where public.

manual_or_agent_sources.name: AJ Bell public market research
manual_or_agent_sources.use_for: UK investor-friendly fund and market commentary. Treat as idea/context, not final validation.

manual_or_agent_sources.name: BlackRock and BlackRock Investment Institute insights
manual_or_agent_sources.use_for: Macro, ETF, factor, and asset-allocation context.

manual_or_agent_sources.name: Goldman Sachs insights
manual_or_agent_sources.use_for: Macro, sector, market, and theme context.

reddit.notes: Social data is for semantic discovery. It must not be used as standalone validation.

social: ticker and company-name searches in investing subreddits

class_a: AJ Bell public market research where available
social: fund, index, sector, and alternative-vehicle searches in investing subreddits
